title: Proof by Contradiction
body:
Assume the opposite.

This leads to a contradiction.

Therefore, the original statement is true.

title: Proof by Contrapositive
body:
We prove the contrapositive.

Assume the conclusion is false.

Then the hypothesis is false.

Therefore, the original implication is true.

title: Proof by Induction
body:
Base case:

Inductive hypothesis:
Assume the statement is true for n = k.

Inductive step:
Show the statement is true for n = k + 1.

Therefore, the statement is true for all valid n.

title: Direct Proof
body:
Assume the hypothesis.

Using the definitions, we show the conclusion.

Therefore, the statement is true.
